# Clicker Heroes Save Editor

> A free, browser-based tool for decoding, inspecting, editing, and re-encoding Clicker Heroes save data — no installation required.

## Summary

Clicker Heroes Save Editor is an open-source web application that lets players load a Clicker Heroes save string or save file, decode it, inspect structured game data, edit values, and export the updated save for import back into the game. It runs in the browser; save data is processed client-side.

Canonical URL: https://clickerheroes.dev/
Live app: https://clickerheroes.dev/
Source repository: https://github.com/magnus-allison/clicker-heroes-save-editor

## Features

- **Decode & Encode Saves** – Paste a raw Clicker Heroes save string; the editor decodes it instantly and re-encodes it after edits.
- **Edit Gold & Rubies** – Directly modify currency values without third-party software.
- **Hero Management** – Inspect and change hero levels, unlocks, gilds, skins, and upgrade states.
- **Ascension Data** – View and edit ascension counts, Hero Souls, Ancients, outsiders, transcensions, and related stats.
- **Achievements & Profile** – Toggle or modify achievement flags and player profile fields.
- **Mercenaries & Clan Values** – Inspect and edit mercenary state, clan raid class, immortal souls, and titan damage values.
- **Raw JSON Editing** – Use the structured JSON view for advanced save inspection and precise custom changes.
- **No Server Uploads** – Save decoding and encoding happen client-side in the browser.

## Primary Use Cases

- Restore lost Clicker Heroes progress by reconstructing a save.
- Edit gold, rubies, Hero Souls, hero levels, Ancients, outsiders, ascensions, and achievements.
- Create test saves for speedruns, guides, videos, build experiments, or modding research.
- Decode a Clicker Heroes save string to understand the save file format.

## Target Audience

- Clicker Heroes players who want to inspect or back up their save data.
- Players who have lost progress and need to restore or reconstruct a save.
- Speedrunners and content creators who need specific save states.
- Developers and modders who want to understand the Clicker Heroes save format.

## Technology

- Next.js web application deployed as a browser-based editor.
- Uses [pako](https://github.com/nodeca/pako) for zlib inflate/deflate of save strings.
- No save data upload is required for normal editing workflows.

## Links

- **Live Tool:** https://clickerheroes.dev/
